dates: Vilnius Music Week, now evolved into the showcase festival MURMURS, is Lithuania's primary international music industry conference and showcase event. The festival spotlights emerging Baltic talent and provides a platform for networking between artists, agents, and promoters.

name: Philippine International Jazz & Ethnic Arts Festival
dates: Philippine International Jazz & Ethnic Arts Festival is a music festival that takes place in Makati City, Philippines. It presents international jazz musicians alongside Philippine jazz and world artists.
